Description

A low-top court sneaker with contrast panels and a padded collar. It gives little outfits a bold streetwear finish.

Shipping & returns

Ships from our global warehouse partners in 10–20 business days. Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Free returns within 30 days of delivery. See our full shipping policy for details.

Materials & care

Crafted with care. Specific materials vary by product — refer to item label. Machine wash cold where applicable; air dry recommended to maintain shape and finish.
